response.justification: Bogdan brings 19+ years of software engineering experience exceeding the minimum requirement and is currently building AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, demonstrating active engagement with emerging AI technologies. However, the AI infrastructure work is very recent (April 2025), and the resume lacks demonstrated products or platforms built with AI, an advanced degree in AI-related fields, or evidence of director-level strategic advisory experience. He's a strong senior engineer with promising AI trajectory but hasn't yet established the recognized AI expertise and principal-level stature expected for this role.
strengths: 19+ years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure, exceeding the 15-year requirement with diverse technical credibility
Currently at re:cinq building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, demonstrating hands-on engagement with cutting-edge AI technologies and emerging AI platforms
Proven technical leadership through founding GISCollective (open-source geospatial platform), public speaking at FOSS4G, and creating advanced technical workshops
concerns: AI-focused work is extremely recent (1 month into current role) with no demonstrated track record of building or shipping AI-powered products or platforms
Lacks Master's degree or PhD in AI-related fields; no formal advanced credentials in AI/ML typically expected for principal-level AI strategy expertise
No evidence of strategic customer advisory experience, business-level AI decision-making, or director-level individual contributor stature required for this role
